---
title: "Home"
page-layout: full
---

::: grid
# Hi, I’m Rylee

I’m an Environmental Studies student interested in GIS, data storytelling, and how we can use spatial tools to understand real-world problems. This website is my space for class projects, maps, and a few things I’m learning along the way.
:::

::: grid

## Quick links

-   [About](about.qmd)
-   [Projects](projects.qmd)
-   [Resume](resume.qmd)
-   [Free-for-all](free.qmd)
:::

::: card
## What I’m working on right now

-   Building this Quarto site + GitHub Pages
-   Adding a few projects and visualizations
-   Cleaning up my portfolio layout
:::

:::: :::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Featured project

::: card
### Coming soon: My first featured project

A short summary of what the project is, what tools I used (ex: ArcGIS Pro / R / Quarto), and what I learned.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Contact

## If you want to reach me, email: **ryleesheils\@gmail.com**
::::
